steps.title: Find the possessor
steps.content: The blank comes before peer autonomous Soviet socialist republics, so it needs a possessive determiner. The possessor is the Tajik Republic, which is singular, so the determiner must be singular and possessive.

steps.title: Separate possessives from contractions
steps.content: Choice A is plural and does not agree with the singular Tajik Republic. Choice B means they are, not possession. Choice D means it is or it has, not possession. The singular possessive determiner fits the sentence. The answer is C.
